title: python-rpm-macros bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 10.
description:
[3.12-10]
- Add brp script to modify .dist-info/INSTALLER file
- Resolves: RHEL-86802

* Tue Oct 29 2024 Troy Dawson <tdawson@redhat.com>
- Bump release for October 2024 mass rebuild:
  Resolves: RHEL-64018

[3.12-8.1]
- %python_extras_subpkg: Add option -a to include BuildArch: noarch

[3.12-8]
- Bump release for June 2024 mass rebuild

[3.12-7]
- %py3_test_envvars: Only set  if not already set

[3.12-6]
- Rebuilt for https://fedoraproject.org/wiki/Fedora_40_Mass_Rebuild

[3.12-5]
- Fix python macro memoizing to account for changing %__python3

[3.12-4]
- Remove %py3_build_egg and %py3_install_egg macros.

[3.12-3]
- Declare the license as an SPDX expression

[3.12-2]
- Rebuilt for https://fedoraproject.org/wiki/Fedora_39_Mass_Rebuild
full_text:
[3.12-10]
- Add brp script to modify .dist-info/INSTALLER file
- Resolves: RHEL-86802

* Tue Oct 29 2024 Troy Dawson <tdawson@redhat.com>
- Bump release for October 2024 mass rebuild:
  Resolves: RHEL-64018

[3.12-8.1]
- %python_extras_subpkg: Add option -a to include BuildArch: noarch

[3.12-8]
- Bump release for June 2024 mass rebuild

[3.12-7]
- %py3_test_envvars: Only set  if not already set

[3.12-6]
- Rebuilt for https://fedoraproject.org/wiki/Fedora_40_Mass_Rebuild

[3.12-5]
- Fix python macro memoizing to account for changing %__python3

[3.12-4]
- Remove %py3_build_egg and %py3_install_egg macros.

[3.12-3]
- Declare the license as an SPDX expression

[3.12-2]
- Rebuilt for https://fedoraproject.org/wiki/Fedora_39_Mass_Rebuild

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-20321-0.html
